Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xC000 "DELIVERANCE-STORMLORDII-SIDE3-C000" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Deliverance - Stormlord II (Levels 5 and 6) (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Made the following changes: 1. NOP'd out the JSR $C142 at $C08F to remove the score code entry needed to start the game (the score code is provided at the end of level four) 2. Set $3289 to $10 to give 16 fairies (this has to be done because this number would ordinarily be derived from the entered score code)
Note: unlike side 2, there was no need to set the number of lives held at $3288 as it already had the default value of $08.
